knowledgeBases.name: Fahrschule Autopilot — SaaS Platform
knowledgeBases.content:
Fahrschule Autopilot is a comprehensive SaaS platform built for driving schools in Germany. The platform spans 37 pages of functionality and integrates 72 API endpoints to power every aspect of driving school operations.

Core Architecture: The platform is built on a modern stack with Next.js for the frontend, Supabase for the backend database and authentication, and n8n for workflow automation. The system uses a multi-tenant architecture where each driving school operates in an isolated environment with their own data.

AI Chatbot: One of the flagship features is an AI-powered chatbot that handles student inquiries 24/7. The chatbot is trained on driving school-specific knowledge including pricing, scheduling, theory exam preparation, and German driving regulations (Fahrerlaubnisverordnung). It uses RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) to pull from a curated knowledge base of driving school FAQs and regulatory information. The chatbot reduced manual inquiry handling by approximately 60%.

Student Management: The platform includes a complete student lifecycle management system — from initial registration and document verification through theory lessons, practical driving sessions, exam scheduling, and license issuance tracking. Students can view their progress, book lessons, and communicate with instructors through a dedicated portal.

Instructor Dashboard: Driving instructors have a dedicated dashboard showing their daily schedule, student progress, vehicle assignments, and route planning. The dashboard integrates with Google Maps for optimal lesson route suggestions based on the student's skill level and upcoming exam routes.

Scheduling Engine: A sophisticated scheduling engine handles lesson bookings with conflict detection, instructor availability management, vehicle allocation, and automatic rescheduling suggestions when cancellations occur. The engine processes approximately 2,000 bookings per month across all tenants.

Payment Integration: Full payment processing through Stripe with support for one-time payments, installment plans, and package deals. The system automatically generates invoices, handles refunds, and provides financial reporting for school administrators.

Automation Workflows: 15+ n8n workflows automate critical business processes including: welcome email sequences for new students, lesson reminder notifications (SMS and email), payment overdue follow-ups, exam preparation checklists, instructor schedule optimization, and monthly business analytics reports.

Analytics Dashboard: School owners access a comprehensive analytics dashboard showing key metrics — student enrollment trends, lesson completion rates, exam pass rates, revenue tracking, instructor utilization, and customer satisfaction scores. Data is visualized through interactive charts with filtering by date range, instructor, and lesson type.

Multi-language Support: The platform supports German, English, and Turkish to serve Germany's diverse student population. All automated communications, the chatbot, and the student portal are fully localized.

Mobile Responsiveness: The entire platform is mobile-first, recognizing that most students interact with the system via smartphone. The student portal, booking system, and chatbot are optimized for mobile with native-app-like interactions.

API Architecture: The 72 API endpoints are organized into logical groups — authentication (8 endpoints), student management (14 endpoints), scheduling (12 endpoints), payments (10 endpoints), instructor management (8 endpoints), chatbot (6 endpoints), analytics (8 endpoints), and administration (6 endpoints). All endpoints follow RESTful conventions with comprehensive error handling and rate limiting.

Security: The platform implements row-level security through Supabase, JWT-based authentication, GDPR-compliant data handling with right-to-deletion support, and encrypted storage for sensitive documents like student IDs and medical certificates.

chatHistory.content: What technology stack does Fahrschule Autopilot use?

Based on the knowledge base, Fahrschule Autopilot is built on a modern technology stack:

**Frontend:** Next.js
**Backend:** Supabase (database and authentication)
**Automation:** n8n for workflow automation
**Architecture:** Multi-tenant architecture with isolated environments per driving school

The platform also integrates with external services like Google Maps for route planning and Stripe for payment processing.
